top_signals.title: Anticipation Building at Nasdaq for SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: The anticipation for the record setting SpaceX initial public offering is building this morning at the Nasdaq. Executives have arrived along with Elon Musk's mother. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand is there. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
